content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.58% with IT crashing -4.69% on HCLTECH guidance disappointment, but broad rotation into defensives (FMCG, Pharma), Power, and PSU Banks is underway. VIX elevated at 18+ signals continued volatility. Breadth is mixed — selective setups exist but chasing extended moves is risky.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24350,
      "nifty_resistance": 24600
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit at market if target not hit in 10 trading days or if close below 76.50",
      "reasoning": "Stellar Q4 (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, NNPA 0.13%). Broker target upgrades to Rs 88-90. Stock broke out to 52w high on volume. Setting SL at 76.50 (below 20-DMA swing support) and target at 88 aligned with HDFC Sec/Systematix. Risk-reward ~1.3:1 on current price but thesis intact with strong momentum. PSU Bank sector leadership supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "new_target": 1075.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit at market if target not hit in 10 trading days or SL hit",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +19% YoY, AUM crossed Rs 90,000 cr, GNPA below 1%. Stock cleared Rs 1,000 intraday with strong volume. MOFSL target Rs 1,143, JPM OW Rs 1,000. Trailing SL up to 945 (below yesterday's close) locks in partial gains. Target 1075 gives 1.9:1 R:R. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.50,
      "new_target": 132.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "time_exit_plan": "Hold as defensive hedge; exit if close below 121.50 or target 132 hit",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge thesis intact with VIX elevated, geopolitical tension (US-Iran ceasefire expiry April 22 is binary). Post-Akshaya Tritiya profit booking is normal. Setting SL at 121.50 (below 20-DMA), target 132 aligned with Goldman's $5400/oz trajectory. Low conviction size-appropriate position."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1595.00,
      "new_target": 1780.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if SL hit or target not reached in 10 trading days, or ahead of Q4 results in May",
      "reasoning": "Breakout above 52w high on 2.3x volume. Power sector theme (heatwave demand + Nabha acquisition accretive). SL 1595 below today's low protects ~3.4%. Target 1780 offers ~1.8:1 R:R. Exit before May Q4 results to avoid binary event risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 35,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1410.00,
      "stop_loss": 1358.00,
      "target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit at market if target not hit in 10 trading days or on close below 1358",
      "reasoning": "Exceptional Q4 beat — revenue +22.6%, PAT +27.2%, EBITDA margin 26.3%, strongest FMCG Q4 print. Decisive breakout to new 52w high on 8%+ gap. Defensive rotation tailwind as IT capitulates. SL below today's low (1386) at 1358; target 1500 gives ~1.7:1 R:R. Position ~Rs 49K (~5% of capital), conservative sizing on extended entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 50,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1050.00,
      "stop_loss": 1008.00,
      "target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit before Q4 results April 25 if not already stopped out or hit target; reassess post-results",
      "reasoning": "Breakout to fresh 52w high on banking sector leadership. Q4 provisional: advances +25.1%, deposits +22.8%. Unique universal-bank moat (Ujjivan rejection highlights AU's standing). Q4 results April 25 is near-term binary — will exit or tighten ahead. SL 1008 ~4%; target 1135 for 2:1 R:R. Position ~Rs 52K."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 70,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 681.00,
      "stop_loss": 652.00,
      "target": 740.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit ahead of Q4 results April 29 regardless of position status to avoid binary event",
      "reasoning": "3.7x volume surge with price at 52w high — strong institutional accumulation into Apr 29 results. Q3 PAT +27.7% YoY. USFDA inspection clean (procedural 483s only). Pharma defensive tailwind. SL 652 (~4.3%), target 740 for ~2:1 R:R. Will EXIT before April 29 results to avoid binary risk. Position ~Rs 48K."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 7.3% extended move but Q3 core PAT was DOWN 30% YoY. Q4 results April 30 is binary event too close. Nestle set high bar that HUL may not clear given its Q3 weakness. Pass for now."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q3 PAT -57% YoY, multiple pipeline project delays, Q4 results May 7 expected weak. Systematix 'Hold' TP 176. Today's 5.49% move is sector rotation not fundamental improvement. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ELECON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -96% YoY (impairment). Revenue -6.5% YoY. Even ex-impairment core PAT -26.4%. 11.93% rally is pure momentum chase after weak print. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ZENTEC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.48,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+33% in one month, overextended. Arms licence catalyst already priced. Mid-cap defence volatility high. Will watch for pullback to Rs 1,600 as better entry. Not today."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+21.5% in 9 sessions, technically overbought. Q3 PAT -18.89% YoY. Q4 board meet April 29 binary risk. Shooting star pattern on April 20 signals exhaustion. Already have TORNTPOWER for power theme exposure. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DEEPAKNTR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Emkay 'Reduce' rating. Q3 PAT halved YoY. 12% move on low 0.5x volume is suspect. Specialty chem under pressure. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Do not catch falling knife. FY27 guidance 1-4% is weakest in tier-1. JM Financial TP Rs 1350 (below spot). Let selling exhaust — monitor only."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TRITURBINE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.48,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "15.3x volume surge but only -0.56% price change suggests distribution as much as accumulation. P/E 55, extended after +20% week. ASM framework risk. Monitor for clarity on catalyst and Q4 results date."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "reasoning": "Lock in thesis-based SL at 76.50 (below swing support and 20-DMA buffer). Strong Q4 + broker upgrades justify holding."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 945.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL to 945 (below recent consolidation). Momentum strong, targets Rs 1075-1143."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.50,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge — SL below 20-DMA. Hold through VIX-driven uncertainty."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1595.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout holding; trail SL below today's low. Exit before May Q4 results to avoid binary."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ZENTEC on pullback to ~1,600 (prior breakout level) for defence re-entry. HCLTECH to monitor for capitulation bottom and IT stabilization. HINDUNILVR post-April 30 Q4 if print beats. ADANIPOWER after cooling off/post-April 29 results.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed rising to ~45% after new entries — still conservative vs 80% cap. Sector exposure diversified: PSU Bank, Housing Finance, Gold (defensive), Power, FMCG, Banking, Pharma. No single sector >20%. All new positions have binary event risk within 5-10 days so sized modestly (5% each). Multiple stocks have Q4 results in late April — will need tight management. Cash buffer of ~55% preserved for opportunities post-results week."
}
